required_preferences.fact: Accepts afternoon volunteer shifts at the literacy center — morning commitments no longer possible during renovations

supersedes.fact: Schedules all teaching or volunteering commitments before lunch — never accepts afternoon sessions

required_preferences.fact: Morning walks replaced by twice-weekly supervised rehab sessions at the clinic; no unsupervised walks until therapist approval

supersedes.fact: Replaced morning group walks with slow, flat strolls alone or with one friend — no group-paced walking or brisk exercise until cleared by cardiologist

required_preferences.fact: Arranges group tours only if at least three friends can commit — never travels solo
Only agrees to teach on topics he feels deeply passionate about — refuses generic curriculum requests
Prepares lesson outlines a week in advance for all volunteer or alumni sessions — never improvises content last-minute
Routinely checks in on friends recovering from illness — never postpones supportive calls

persona: A retired teacher who enjoys group tours with friends
